name: Cherry Peach Cobbler
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Pour the combined cherry and peach pie fillings into a 9x13-inch oblong baking dish, stirring to blend.
3. In a small bowl, mix together the sugar and cinnamon.
4. Cut each biscuit into triangles or squares.
5. Dip each biscuit piece first in melted butter, then into the sugar and cinnamon mixture.
6. Place the biscuit pieces on top of the fruit filling.
7. Bake for 18-20 minutes, or until the topping is browned.
8. Serve warm.
